title: The Saruyama Alliance Gets Involved
description: The Straw Hats meet Mont Blanc Cricket and the Saruyama Alliance, whose lives are tied to the legend of Noland and the search for sky.
scene: Across pages 11, 12, 13, 14, this scene centers on Mont Blanc Cricket, Masira, Chopper, Bellamy, Shojo. The Straw Hats meet Mont Blanc Cricket and the Saruyama Alliance, whose lives are tied to the legend of Noland and the search for sky.

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: We saw them returning back to dock!

dialogue.speaker: Masira
dialogue.text: Don't be mutterin' there to yeresives now!

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: Gave me the jitters, ya did.

dialogue.speaker: Shojo
dialogue.text: Pretty queer face you got there.

dialogue.speaker: Masira
dialogue.text: Whoa ho! Hey, watch it, punks!

dialogue.speaker: Masira
dialogue.text: Aghh, pipe down. It's fine, it's fine.

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: Ohh... You want to join the Shichibukai?

dialogue.speaker: Shojo
dialogue.text: Hmmm!? Now that's a surprising response!

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: How dare you say that about our-

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: This is my ter- Ritory yer on!

summary: The Straw Hats meet Mont Blanc Cricket and the Saruyama Alliance, whose lives are tied to the legend of Noland and the search for sky.
